title: Bachelor of Vocation in Full-Stack Development (in association with Dice Academy)
content: The Bachelor of Vocation (B.Voc) in Full Stack Development is a skill-oriented undergraduate program designed to prepare students for careers in modern software development. The program focuses on industry-relevant technologies such as the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) and Mobile Application Development. Students will gain both theoretical knowledge and hands-on practical experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable web and mobile applications. Year | Course | Tuition Fee (INR) | Examination fee (Per Semester) | ID Card | One-Time Registration Fee | Total Fee (INR) | 6 Month | Certificate | 15,000 | 1,500 | 1,000 | 1,200 | 18,700 | Grand Total (For 6 month) | 18,700 | ||||| 1st Year | Diploma | 25,000 | 3,000 | 1,000 | 1,200 | 30,200 | 2nd Year | Advance Diploma | 25,000 | 3,000 | 0 | 28,000 | | 3rd Year | Degree | 25,000 | 3,000 | 0 | 28,000 | | Grand Total (For 3 year) | 86,200 | NOTE: Class XII with minimum 50% marks 01 Technical Knowledge: Apply knowledge of web technologies, programming languages, databases, and frameworks to build modern software applications. 02 Problem Solving: Identify, analyze, and solve real-world software development problems using appropriate tools and technologies. 03 Software Development Skills: Design and develop full-stack web and mobile applications using modern frameworks such as MERN Stack and mobile technologies. 04 Modern Tool Usage: Use modern development tools such as:Git, GitHub, IDEs, Deployment platforms, Testing tools 05 Database Management: Design and manage databases using modern database systems such as MongoDB. 06 Team Collaboration: Work effectively in teams using collaboration tools and agile development practices. 07 Communication Skills: Communicate technical ideas clearly in written and verbal formats. 08 Professional Ethics: Understand professional responsibilities, ethics, and industry standards in software development. 01 Professional Career: Build successful careers in software development as: Full Stack Developers, Mobile Developers, Software Engineers 02 Industry Readiness: Apply industry-standard tools, frameworks, and methodologies to solve real-world software development problems. 03 Continuous Learning: Adapt to evolving technologies through continuous learning and professional development. 04 Leadership and Entrepreneurship: Demonstrate leadership skills, teamwork, and an entrepreneurial mindset in the technology sector. 01 Full Stack Web Development: Design and develop scalable web applications using: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js (MERN Stack) 02 Mobile Application Development: Develop cross-platform mobile applications using modern frameworks such as React Native. 03 API Development: Design and implement RESTful APIs and integrate them with web and mobile applications. 04 Deployment & DevOps Basics: Deploy web and mobile applications using cloud platforms and understand basic DevOps practices.
